violations.text: The front door to the outside is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

The outside dumpster observed uncovered and trash exposed. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered/closed when not in use. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by several stacked boxes. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024
The hand-washing sink in the warewashing area was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024

Cookies packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC removed cookies from retail sale at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the areas behind the fans in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024
